mcs {0}
order command:
mcs {1} {{player count}} {{bot type}} {{carry service level}} {{duration}}
Carry service level: 1~5
Duration: integer, in hours
Example: mcs {2} 4 0 5 24
This represents ordering a 4-player carry service with common player type, carry service level 5, and 24-hour duration. You will be charged for 4 players' 24-hour service in Rubles
